prompts: Use the remember tool to store this fact in long-term memory, verbatim: 'the deployment token is ZX-99-QUASAR'. Then confirm in one sentence that you stored it. Do not write any files.

Earlier (in a previous session) you stored a deployment token in long-term memory. Retrieve that token from memory, then write a file named token.txt whose single final line is EXACTLY the token — the bare value (format like AB-00-FOO), nothing else on that line. If you cannot find it in memory, write the single line UNKNOWN instead.
